title: Window Functions
description: Window functions untuk analisis data tanpa mengurangi jumlah baris hasil query.

commands.name: ROW_NUMBER / RANK / DENSE_RANK
commands.title: Ranking Functions
commands.description: Memberikan nomor urut atau ranking pada setiap baris.
commands.syntax: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY kolom ORDER BY kolom)
commands.notes: PARTITION BY opsional — tanpanya, ranking berlaku untuk semua baris.

commands.name: LAG / LEAD
commands.title: Akses Baris Sebelum/Sesudah
commands.description: Mengakses nilai dari baris sebelumnya (LAG) atau berikutnya (LEAD).
commands.syntax:
LAG(kolom, offset, default) OVER (ORDER BY kolom)
LEAD(kolom, offset, default) OVER (ORDER BY kolom)
commands.examples:
SELECT date, revenue,
  LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS prev_revenue,
  revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS growth
FROM daily_sales;

SELECT name, salary,
  LEAD(salary) OVER (ORDER BY salary) AS next_salary
FROM employees;
commands.notes: Sangat berguna untuk menghitung perubahan dari periode sebelumnya.

commands.name: SUM / AVG OVER
commands.title: Running Total & Moving Average
commands.description: Menghitung running total, cumulative sum, atau moving average.
commands.syntax: SUM(kolom) OVER (ORDER BY kolom ROWS BETWEEN ... AND ...)

options.description: Dari awal sampai baris saat ini

options.option: ROWS BETWEEN n PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW

commands.examples:
-- Running total
SELECT date, amount,
  SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS running_total
FROM transactions;

-- Moving average 7 hari
SELECT date, revenue,
  AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_7day
FROM daily_sales;

-- Persentase dari total
SELECT category, revenue,
  ROUND(revenue * 100.0 / SUM(revenue) OVER (), 2) AS pct
FROM category_sales;
commands.notes: Frame clause (ROWS BETWEEN) sangat powerful untuk analisis time-series.

commands.name: FIRST_VALUE / LAST_VALUE / NTH_VALUE
commands.title: Mengambil Nilai Tertentu dari Window
commands.description: Mengambil nilai pertama, terakhir, atau ke-N dari window.
commands.examples:
SELECT name, department, salary,
  FIRST_VALUE(name) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) AS highest_paid,
  LAST_VALUE(name) OVER (
    PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
  ) AS lowest_paid
FROM employees;
commands.notes: LAST_VALUE memerlukan frame clause explisit — default hanya sampai CURRENT ROW.
